nasb.text: But the vine said to them, ‘Shall I leave my new wine, which cheers God and men, and go to wave over the trees?’

esv.text: But the vine said to them, ‘Shall I leave my wine that cheers God and men and go hold sway over the trees?’

cnv.text: 葡萄樹對它們說：‘我怎可以放棄生產那使　神和世人都喜樂的新酒，飄搖在眾樹之上呢？’

ccb.text: 葡萄树说，‘我怎能因为贪图凌驾于众树之上而停止出产令神明和世人都快乐的美酒呢？’
